subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again — I'd be glad to set something up.

I'm available for a call on the following dates and times:
  • Tuesday, April 21 — 14:00–16:00
  • Wednesday, April 22 — 14:00–16:00
  • Thursday, April 23 — 14:00–16:00

Which of these works for you? Happy to lock in whichever slot suits you best.

On the subject of direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to provide those. If you'd like to loop them in, the best approach is to keep things moving through this thread and we can make those arrangements together.

Thanks,
Best regards
